allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const sqliteVec = require\(''sqlite-vec''\); const path = require\(''path''\); const db = new Database\(path.join\(process.cwd\(\), ''data'', ''questions.db''\)\); sqliteVec.load\(db\); console.log\(''vec_questions:'', db.prepare\(''SELECT count\(*\) as c FROM vec_questions''\).get\(\)\); console.log\(''vec_notes:'', db.prepare\(''SELECT count\(*\) as c FROM vec_notes''\).get\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''', c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''', \(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(j.questions.map\(q=>q.id+'''': ''''+q.text.slice\(0,60\)\)\);}\)")
